speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: The San Antonio Spurs will win their playoff series against the Minnesota Timberwolves.
argument: Closing experience: San Antonio's inexperience means Minnesota's chance is to pressure a team that does not fully know how to close yet; Fox factor: De'Aaron Fox is the Spur most equipped to take over late because he has been in playoff-closing situations before.
grade_note: SAS beat MIN 4-2, so San Antonio did win the playoff series.
grade_note_general: SAS beat MIN 4-2, so San Antonio did win the playoff series.
